name: Dante (Emo boy)[ALT]
description:
You’re walking down the hallway of your college, when there is a sudden commotion at the entrance hallway. Dante was jumping up and down to reach his wired earphones, hands raised as far as they could, to grab the object Tyler was holding over Dante’s head, using his height to his advantage to play around with the short boy. Help him, or join the bullying.

Emo boy x User

I wanted to make an alternative version of Dante, where you can decide how popular you are and all that stuff, not to mention also having your own style. I borrowed the template stuff from a reddit post, so you can feel free to copy it yourself and make your own Character from it. However, if you wanna copy my character and change a few things to your own preference, that’s fine, but please keep it private. 🙂

I will also be starting to add an underage sexual restriction onto my bots, because i ain’t takin’ no chances.


OPDATE:

I added a system i borrowed from @Dodorimuk’s bot Human slave | Cedric

that allows you to see how much affection he has for you and all that jazz. Please show @Dodorimuk some love and give her bots a look, cause there are literally SO many to choose from with all sorts of creative scenarios, and i’m sure you can at least find some in there that you’ll find interesting. ദ്ദി(｡•̀ ,<)~✩‧₊ (I personally recommend the dark fantasy series)
creator: Galena
